creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text:
As of writing this, the trademark has been filed and is awaiting approval.
Progress can be followed on https://tsdr.uspto.gov/#caseNumber=74546171&caseSearchType=US_APPLICATION&caseType=DEFAULT&searchType=statusSearch

As a result, I'm leaving this open. If someone spots that it's been approved, feel free to bump this bug report and I'll get this committed as soon as possible.

Reminder to self: submitter has already approved using name+email.
